text: Bete ne aaj khane par announce kar diya ki hum gaon ka purana ghar bech rahe hain, mujhse ek baar poocha tak nahi. Bahu ne turant taana maara ki meri beemari ke kharche ki wajah se ye sab ho raha hai aur ab rona aa raha hai, dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha ki is umar mein kahan jaungi, bas gala rone se bhara hua hai.

Bina mujhse salah liye bete ne meri poori pension ek naye investment mein laga di aur jab maine pucha toh bola ki ab ghar ke faisle wo lega. Bahu keh rahi hai ki 'sab tumhari wajah se ho raha hai' aur agar maine gussa kiya toh unka BP badh jayega. Itni ghabrahat aur dukh ho raha hai ki main kuch soch hi nahi pa rahi, bas kamre mein band hokar sisak rahi hoon.

Aaj subah bete ne announce kiya ki main ab apne pote ke sath nahi rahungi kyunki meri purani soch usey 'bigad' rahi hai. Bahu ne seene pe haath rakh kar bol diya ki meri zidd unhe shamshaan pahuncha degi aur unka heart kamzor ho gaya hai. Mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas flood of emotions mein doobi hui hoon aur lag raha hai ki saans ruk jayegi.

Bina meri marzi ke bete ne mere kamre ka saman hata kar usey store room banane ka announce kar diya. Bahu ne rona-dhona shuru kar diya ki meri wajah se unhe roz padosiyon ki baatein sunni padti hain aur unka sukh-chain chheen gaya hai. Mujhe itna dukh aur frustration mehsus ho raha hai ki mera dimaag kaam hi nahi kar raha, bas rona hi nikal raha hai.

Bete ne aaj khane par sabke samne bol diya ki main ab se kisi rishtedaar ke ghar nahi jaungi kyunki meri wajah se 'izzat' kharab hoti hai. Bahu keh rahi hai ki 'sab tumhari manhoosiyat ki wajah se ho raha hai' aur unka dimaag phat raha hai. Main poori tarah se toot gayi hoon, bas rona hi aa raha hai aur andhera lag raha hai, samajh nahi aa raha kaise handle karun.
